UpdateSourceArgs: -NoProfile -Command "$cfg='{{$FullBaseDir}}RSDragonwilds/Saved/Config/WindowsServer/DedicatedServer.ini'; if (-not (Test-Path $cfg)) { New-Item -ItemType File -Path $cfg -Force *> $null }; $content = @(); if (Test-Path $cfg) { $content = Get-Content $cfg | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^(OwnerId|ServerName|DefaultWorldName|AdminPassword|WorldPassword)=' } }; $content += 'OwnerId={{OwnerId}}'; $content += 'ServerName={{ServerName}}'; $content += 'DefaultWorldName={{DefaultWorldName}}'; $content += 'AdminPassword={{AdminPassword}}'; if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace('{{WorldPassword}}')) { $content += 'WorldPassword={{WorldPassword}}' }; Set-Content -Path $cfg -Value $content -Encoding ASCII"
